name: Track Optimizer
description: Automatically clean up unconnected track ends (stubs) and merge overlapping/collinear tracks.
description_full: A powerful Python-based plugin to keep your KiCad PCB designs clean and DRC-error-free. It features advanced geometry algorithms to recursively hunt down and remove dangling track stubs, and merges collinear or overlapping track segments into single continuous traces, greatly optimizing your board's routing.
